title: Potato Paintings DATAPACK
description: A datapack that add the painting from the potato update (April fools 2024)
body:
This datapack adds the paintings from the paintings from the potato update that came out for the April Fools of 2024

**WARNING** you will need the [resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/potato-paintings-resources-pack) to make the pack work correctly
Here's the list of all the new paintings
- Tasty Shapes
> 2x2
> In-game description: Mr. Potato
- Self-portrait
> 2x3
> In-game description: Mr. Potato
- Potato
> 4x2
> In-game description: Cris B
- In The Spotlight
> 3x3
> In-game description: Mr. Potato
- Hot Potato
> 4x4
> In-game description: Mr. Potato
- This is not a potato
> 8x4
> In-game description: Mr. Potato
- The Treachery of Potatoes
> 8x8
> In-game description: Mr. Potato
